description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Push that triggers on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and allows manual dispatch. In a single ubuntu-latest job, check out the repository, install various Arduino libraries (TFT_eSPI, LinkedList, lv_arduino, JPEGDecoder, NimBLE-Arduino, Adafruit_NeoPixel, ArduinoJson, SwitchLib), configure TFT_eSPI, install ESP32 boards, compile MarauderOTA and Marauder for Flipper Zero WiFi Dev Board using arduino-test-compile, modify platform.txt, display finished binaries, and upload the esp32_marauder.ino.bin artifact.
